name: Adamus Phillida
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a full set of Imperial Watch armor and carries a silver longsword. When sleeping after retirement, he wears sack cloth pants.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: dedicated, vigilant, persistent, commanding, career-focused
Role: Commander of the Imperial Legion in Cyrodiil, the highest-ranking Legion member in the province. Has served in the Imperial Legion for forty years, spending much of his career investigating the Dark Brotherhood and working to hinder their operations. His long-standing interference with the Brotherhood has made him a notable enemy of theirs.
Home Location Information: Originally stationed at the Imperial Legion barracks in the Imperial City's Prison District. After retirement, he relocates to the Leyawiin City Watch Barracks.
Daily Routine - Active Service: Phillida sleeps in the Imperial Legion barracks from midnight to 6am, then eats breakfast until midday in the Imperial Legion Offices. After lunch he wanders around the Prison District until 4pm, then patrols the Market District until 8pm. From 8pm to 11pm, he investigates the Dark Brotherhood shrine located in Claudius Arcadia's house. If time permits before bed, he relaxes in a chair in the Imperial Legion Offices.
Daily Routine - Retirement in Leyawiin: Phillida sleeps in the barracks between 2am and 6am, then has breakfast until 9am at the Three Sisters' Inn. He wanders around the Coast Guard Station until 1pm, then heads to the lakeside for his daily swim. He stands by the lake until 3pm before actually entering the water, swimming until 8pm. Afterwards he spends an hour near the pond before returning to the Watch Barracks, where he eats and wanders until his 2am bedtime. After retirement, he is assigned a bodyguard who accompanies him everywhere.
The Dark Brotherhood Investigation: Phillida has made investigating the Dark Brotherhood a central focus of his career. He has access to Claudius Arcadia's house, where he regularly investigates a Dark Brotherhood shrine. His decades of work hindering their operations has made him a significant thorn in their side.
Personality - The Relentless Commander: Phillida is defined by his forty-year career in the Imperial Legion and his unwavering dedication to duty. His rise to the highest Legion rank in Cyrodiil speaks to his competence and persistence. His focused investigation of the Dark Brotherhood demonstrates his commitment to rooting out threats to the Empire, showing a methodical and determined approach to his work. Even in retirement, he maintains a structured routine and accepts protective security, suggesting he understands the dangers his career has brought.
author: Bethesda
